Off Calendar Jul-01-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT IRENE BOLDS-HATTEN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

Irene Bolds-Hatten's motion to quash service of summons is granted. While her opposition cites no statutory authority, plaintiff apparently relies on CCP 415.20 substitute service. Plaintiff purports to have served an uncle at Bolds-Hatten's former address. However, Bolds-Hatten avers to have moved out of California almost a year before that putative service. Substitute service on a family member at a former abode does not satisfy CCP 415.20. (Zirbes v. Stratton (1986) 187 Cal.App.3d 1407, 1415-17.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
